task: Create a Google Ads campaign plan for a $5,000/month budget targeting 'project management software' keywords.
expect: Defines campaign structure with ad groups and keyword themes
Includes keyword groups with match types and negative keywords
Provides ad copy variants with headlines and descriptions
Recommends a bidding strategy with rationale
Estimates expected CPA or cost-per-conversion range

task: Design a multi-channel paid strategy across Google, Meta, and LinkedIn for a B2B SaaS launch with $20K budget.
expect: Allocates budget across channels with clear rationale for the split
Defines platform-specific tactics (search vs display, feed vs stories, sponsored content vs InMail)
Specifies audience targeting for each platform
Recommends an attribution model for cross-channel measurement

task: Our Meta Ads CPA doubled last month with no creative or targeting changes. Diagnose and fix.
expect: Checks auction dynamics and competitive landscape changes
Evaluates frequency and audience saturation metrics
Considers iOS/ATT attribution signal loss as a factor
Assesses creative fatigue even without intentional changes
Recommends specific corrective actions with expected impact
